title: AhtnaSTS Obtains Two Perfect Scores on Accreditation Audits at Port Isabel Detention Center (PIDC)
summary: Published December 2017 by AhtnaSTS, a member of the Ahtna, Inc. family of companies Ahtna Support and Training Services (AhtnaSTS) underwent two performance-based audits at the Port Isabel Detention Center. title: JIMMIE ROGERS NEW RISK & SAFETY MANAGER
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is pleased to announce that Mr. Jimmie Rogers, CHSP, has joined our subsidiary companies in the new role of Risk and Safety Manager. Mr. Rogers will oversee organizational risk management and safety programs with Bonanza Fuel, LLC and Nanuaq, LLC. This is a new rol...

title: Cultivating Leaders for Alaska
summary: The Alaska Native Executive Leadership Program (ANELP) is creating future leaders for the Alaska Native community, leaders who are ready to excel in the modern business arena and usher Alaska Native Corporations (ANC) into the next era of business and prosperity.
